modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about approved software for use.

full_description_text:  
Hey, I’m trying to find out what software I can actually use. Is there a list of approved programs somewhere? Just want to make sure I’m using the right stuff.
short_description: Inquiry about approved software for use.
description: Hey, I’m trying to find out what software I can actually use. Is there a list of approved programs somewhere? Just want to make sure I’m using the right stuff.
